checks.name: Diff integrity
checks.details: git diff --check completed without whitespace errors.

checks.name: Prettier
checks.details: The renderer, CSS module, design artifact, and run artifact match repository formatting.

checks.name: ESLint
checks.details: npm run lint completed with zero errors; seven pre-existing unrelated unused-variable warnings remain.

checks.name: Production build
checks.details: npm run build completed successfully and statically generated every song route.

checks.name: React best-practices review
checks.details: The change remains an imperative, post-render SVG typography transform within the existing effect and introduces no new state, hooks, component boundaries, or dependencies.

checks.name: Scoped changes
checks.details: Product-code changes are confined to the renderer and local font registry; song data, alphaTex generation, staff engraving, layout density, routes, and dependencies are unchanged.

visual_checks.name: Selected Scheherazade treatment
visual_checks.details: The rendered roots, qualities, extensions, accidentals, slash marks, and bass letters use Score Scheherazade New and visually match the Scheherazade comparison row selected by the user.

visual_checks.name: Quality and alteration hierarchy
visual_checks.details: Triangle-seven and minus-seven remain compact on the native baseline, while C7 flat-nine and E7 sharp-nine retain small raised alterations.

visual_checks.name: Mobile available-width fit
visual_checks.details: At 375px, 390px, and 430px the document width equals the viewport width, with zero detected same-row chord collisions.

visual_checks.name: All-song mobile coverage
visual_checks.details: All five song routes were checked at 390px; every route loaded the Scheherazade font with zero horizontal overflow and zero detected same-row chord collisions.

visual_checks.name: Representative notation coverage
visual_checks.details: Browser checks covered major-seven, minor-seven, dominant extensions, inline flat and sharp roots, slash basses, sus and add modifiers, flat-nine, and sharp-nine.

visual_checks.name: Desktop regression
visual_checks.details: At 1024px the score retains its desktop density, has zero horizontal overflow, and has zero detected same-row chord collisions.

visual_checks.name: Served font and runtime integrity
visual_checks.details: document.fonts.check passed for Score Scheherazade New; the served CSS contains Scheherazade and no Edwin rule, and a fresh reload produced no console or page errors.

visual_checks.name: Redundant labels
visual_checks.details: The typography-only change adds no labels, headings, controls, or repeated contextual text.
